articles.title: Cabinet split as Mahmood calls on Starmer to set out timetable to go
articles.description: Over 70 Labour MPs have publicly urged the PM either to resign immediately or set out a timetable to stand down.

articles.title: Chris Mason: PM confronts his most difficult day as party revolts
articles.description: A dam appears to have broken, with Labour MPs posting their public loss of confidence in the PM, our political editor writes.

articles.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
articles.description: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

articles.title: How the Trump-Xi summit could set superpower relations for many years to come
articles.description: Trump's whirlwind visit to China is the most significant for years - but will it bear fruit?
